sync_type: Custom integration via API or middleware (Zapier, Make, n8n)
popularity: medium — common for SMBs migrating from Pipedrive (Sales CRM) to HubSpot (full platform), or using Pipedrive for sales pipeline and HubSpot for marketing

authentication_requirements.hubspot_side: OAuth 2.0 or Private App Token with CRM object scopes.
authentication_requirements.pipedrive_side: OAuth 2.0 (recommended for higher rate limits) or Personal API Token. OAuth provides 4x higher burst limits.

common_use_cases: Migrate Pipedrive deals, persons, and organizations to HubSpot
Bi-directional contact/person sync between Pipedrive and HubSpot
Sync Pipedrive deal stages to HubSpot deal pipeline
Keep both CRMs in sync during phased migration from Pipedrive to HubSpot
Use Pipedrive for sales pipeline and HubSpot for marketing automation in parallel

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Pipedrive uses numeric custom field keys (e.g., custom_fields.12345) that differ per account. Hardcoding field keys causes data to sync to wrong fields.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Use Pipedrive API to dynamically discover custom field mappings. Store field key-to-name mappings per connected account. Build a UI for users to map fields manually.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Exceeded token-based burst limit. Pipedrive imposes a 10s penalty window (not standard retry-after).
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Use OAuth instead of API token for 4x higher limits. Migrate to v2 endpoints (50% fewer tokens). Implement exponential backoff with jitter (2s → 4s → 8s + random). Single queue for API requests.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Pipedrive v1 endpoints for persons, deals, activities, organizations were deprecated April 2025, availability not guaranteed after Dec 31, 2025.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Migrate all API calls to v2 equivalents in 2026. v2 uses cursor-based pagination, is more efficient, and costs fewer tokens.

community_solutions.problem: Rate limits causing sync failures during bulk migration
community_solutions.solution: Use Pipedrive v2 endpoints (50% fewer tokens). Chunk operations into small batches. Use OAuth instead of API token. Run migration during off-peak hours. Use middleware with built-in rate limit handling (n8n, Make).

community_solutions.problem: Mapping Pipedrive stages to HubSpot pipelines
community_solutions.solution: Use Pipedrive /api/v1/pipelines endpoint to fetch all stages. Map stage IDs to HubSpot deal stage labels via custom property. Handle the case where pipeline structures differ (e.g., Pipedrive supports multiple pipelines, HubSpot requires pipeline ID mapping).
